Locale.moodle_icke_rage_desc: Massive adrenaline dump. Increased damage output and pain tolerance.
Locale.moodle_icke_crash_desc: The adrenaline has faded. Exhaustion is setting in. Mobility severely reduced.
Locale.moodle_baron_pride_desc: Interactions with survivors are greatly improved.
Locale.moodle_albino_active_desc: Pain receptors severed. Pushing past physical limits. // Again... AGAIN! AGAAAIINNN!!!!
Locale.moodle_albino_after2_desc: Severe hypertension. Rapid blood loss. // I only have one more chance. I can't waste it.
Locale.moodle_albino_after3_desc: THIS IS THE END. NO SECOND CHANCES.
Locale.hint_milky: LOG MISSING: Seek out the physical records left behind.
Locale.hint_dune: LOG MISSING: The shifting sands hide old texts. Find what was written.
Locale.hint_baron: DEPTH REQUIREMENT: Survive the plunge to Layer 5.
Locale.hint_roza: BIOMETRIC LOCK: Core temperature must reach absolute failure.
Locale.hint_voyager: TACTICAL LOCK: Traverse an entire layer without shedding a single drop of blood.
Locale.hint_leapy: TRAUMA LOCK: Experience catastrophic, simultaneous bipedal fractures.
Locale.hint_chompy: TRAUMA LOCK: Starve the brain of oxygen until the absolute brink of oblivion.
Locale.hint_icke: TACTICAL LOCK: Execute a hostile target while clinging to your own fading life.
Locale.hint_chik: TACTICAL LOCK: Execute a hostile target while suspended by jet propulsion.
Locale.hint_shelly: TRAUMA LOCK: Stand inside the blast radius and walk out alive.
Locale.hint_default: Genetic profile corrupted. Fulfill requirement to unlock.
Locale.species_experiment_desc: The original. Balanced in every way. The baseline.
Locale.species_experiment_traits: Unmodified physiology. No remarkable resistances, no remarkable weaknesses.
Locale.species_orange_desc: Slow and stupid brute. Dangerously tough. Resilient.
Locale.species_orange_traits: Thick hide and dense muscle blunt impacts and gunfire alike before they reach anything vital.
Locale.species_milky_traits: A frame built for precision, not punishment. Every wound lands harder than it should.
Locale.species_leapy_desc: Glass cannon. Very agile, very frail. Hyper-regenerative.
Locale.species_leapy_traits: A hyperactive metabolism knits wounds shut fast... almost fast enough to make up for how easily they open.
Locale.species_chompy_desc: Beware of them in water. Strong but sluggish on land.
Locale.species_chompy_traits: An aquatic build with natural padding. Built to take a hit, not to dodge one.
Locale.species_roza_desc: Supportive unit. Very similar to an Experiment, but hardier.
Locale.species_roza_traits: An unusually low body temperature leaves them shrugging off cold that would stop others cold.
Locale.species_voyager_desc: Quick but frail. Light-footed and intelligent.
Locale.species_voyager_traits: Built light and built fast... at the cost of anything that could be called sturdy.
Locale.species_baron_desc: Extremely massive health pool. No health regeneration.
Locale.species_baron_traits: A wall of meat and muscle that simply does not go down, but whatever damage does land, lingers. Their body doesn't mend itself like the others.
Locale.species_chik_desc: Aerial and delicate. Fast hands, fragile body.
Locale.species_chik_traits: A flexible, lightweight frame built for the air. Built to break if it ever stays on the ground too long.
Locale.species_crystal_desc: Average in combat. Clumsy with weaponry. Tough facade.
Locale.species_crystal_traits: A tough, crystalline hide that holds up about as well as anyone else's. No better, no worse.
Locale.species_velvet_desc: Tanky with bad weapon handling. Beware their endurance.
Locale.species_icke_desc: Bad weapon handling, very high jumps. Adrenaline junkie.
Locale.species_icke_traits: Blood overloaded with adrenaline. The worse the wound, the more dangerous they become.
Locale.species_shelly_desc: Very tanky. Very sluggish. Lowered health regeneration.
Locale.species_shelly_traits: A heavy exoskeleton shrugs off flame and shrapnel that would cripple softer bodies... but it heals slowly, and it isn't going anywhere fast.
Locale.species_dune_desc: High level skill. High level threat. Lowered regen.
Locale.species_dune_traits: Gilled and built for water, with a simple mind that keeps them dangerously clear-headed under pressure.
Locale.species_albino_desc: This is exactly where it all leads. There are no other paths.
Locale.species_albino_traits: An Experi#$@* // Again. We must go again. Further this time.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel2: All my friends were relocated. Was this the destination?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel3: Hah. Wow. It really is gray.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel4: My landing was shallow, I can still see the sky. I have a way to go.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel5: I'm in one piece, for now. Play it safe.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel6: I'm... Too weak for a mission like this, no? I should make the most of what I find.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel7: A Milky being sent here? Were there no better candidates?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel8: Compose yourself. You're here for a reason. Get it done.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel9: Hah... Now that I'm here... I thought I prepared myself for this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel10: Maybe I can find some others to help. Maybe other Milkies?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel12: It's a long way down. I need to get stronger.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seeGravel13: I'm a Milky. I wasn't made for this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatGood8: Wish we had more of this at the lab!
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatMediocre10: There might be something better elsewhere.
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatBad2: What the actual fuck was that?
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatBad7: You know what?- I'm not hungry anymore.
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatBad9: I'm going to puke. That was vile.
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatBad14: I shouldn't have put that in my mouth!
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatBad16: That was not okay. That was awful. Never again.
Locale.dialogue_milky_eatBad17: I need to... Wash that down... Ughh...
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat3: Some things weren't made to be eaten. This is one of those things.
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat4: Looks awful. Smells awful. Why the fuck would I eat that?
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat6: That is not an option I'm willing to take.
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat9: This is my boundary. I'm not eating that.
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat10: Am I that hungry? Why did I even consider this?
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat11: Wow, that is horrid. I'm not trying that.
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat12: My limbs look tastier than this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat13: I think I would self cannibalise before I ate that.
Locale.dialogue_milky_refuseEat14: I could also eat a rock. That could work.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tired6: Finding some place to sleep is my priority.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tired8: I don't need drowsiness weighing me down.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tired11: Mm... Yeah, it's time to sleep.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tired12: Where's the nearest comfortable spot to sleep?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tired13: I should find someplace safe and nap for a while.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tired15: Time to settle down a little.
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired1: I can't keep my eyes open...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired2: I'll just... Sleep on the floor... At this point...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired7: This tiredness is making me sick...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired8: I feel so heavy... I need to rest...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired9: Where... I need to find somewhere... To sleep...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired12: I'm so weak... I want to sleep...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired16: I want to sleep... I just want to sleep...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verytired19: I've done more than enough... I want to sleep...
Locale.dialogue_milky_wakeup2: It is time for a new day.
Locale.dialogue_milky_wakeup5: What is going to happen today..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_wakeup7: Let's make today a good day.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sick1: I'm ill. My body isn't right.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sick3: The world is spinning... I'm sick.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sick7: My stomach is really upset with me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sick8: I knew eating that was a bad idea!..
Locale.dialogue_milky_verysick4: Ugh... I want to throw up...
Locale.dialogue_milky_verysick7: My belly... What did I do..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomit2: I need to keep my food... Inside me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomit8: I need to watch what I eat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomit10: Fuck- okay... I hate the feeling of throwing up...
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitblood2: B-blood... I need... I need to do something...
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitblood10: Internal b-bleeding, I... I need to stop it...
Locale.dialogue_milky_full9: I might put on weight if I continue.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry1: My hunger is going to be a problem.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry2: Let's look for something to eat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry3: Do I have any food on me?
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry5: I am peckish. Let's have some food.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry6: I would like to eat something.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry7: Let's get some energy back, I'm hungry.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungry10: Right, where to grab a bite.
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving1: My hunger is becoming a problem.
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving5: I need to focus on getting food.
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving6: Okay... Focus... I'm hungry, I need food.
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving8: Is there anything edible around? Anything I can make?
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving9: Now is REALLY the time for food.
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving12: I'm feeling weak. I need to eat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_starving13: This is getting too much. I must eat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_thirsty9: I'd love to quench my thirst.
Locale.dialogue_milky_thirsty11: Do I have anything to drink on me?
Locale.dialogue_milky_thirsty12: I might have a drink on my person.
Locale.dialogue_milky_thirsty13: I should check, I might have something I could drink.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dehydrated8: I'm getting dizzy. I need water...
Locale.dialogue_milky_dehydrated10: I've been without water too long.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dehydrated14: I'd rather be slaked and overhydrated right now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dehydrated15: Let's focus on water. We should.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dehydrated16: A drink is my priority right now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dehydrated17: I'm okay with drinking anything at this point.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbmuscle9: My <limb> muscle health... I need to fix that.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbmuscle10: <limb> is a little fucked. I need to sort that out.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbmuscle11: I need to sort my <limb> out.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbmuscle12: My <limb> hurts to move. The muscles are in rough shape.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbinfected5: My <limb> feels warm. It must be an infection.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbinfected9: My <limb> looks off. I need to disinfect it.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbinfected11: Antiseptic for my <limb>. I'm on it.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbinfected12: Something antiseptic for my <limb> is crucial.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbinfected13: I'd rather my <limb> isn't infected. Antiseptic is a must.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbinfected14: I need to clean my <limb>. The infection is worsening.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin3: I need to bandage up my <limb>.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin4: My <limb> feels exposed. I could get infected.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin5: I need to take care of my <limb>.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin10: My <limb> is going to get infected.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin16: I cannot leave my <limb> in this state.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin17: Bandages for my <limb> is a must.
Locale.dialogue_milky_limbskin18: I'm risking an infection to my <limb> if I don't sort this out.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad11: I can't let all of this get to me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad12: It's lonely in here. I thought that wouldn't bother me, but...
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad13: I miss any sort of companionship.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad14: I wish I had someone alongside me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad16: I wish I could find a friend.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad17: I'm starting to feel the isolation.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad18: Is this what my life is going to be now?
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad19: I... I should get used to this feeling.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad20: Milky... Hah. I'm not made for this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad21: You can do this, Milky. Chin up.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad22: Stiffen up that upper lip. Come on, Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad23: I feel distracted. I need to keep my composure.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad24: I shouldn't let these... Things... Get to me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sad25: You've got this Milky. Prove your worth.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy9: I have no luck at this point.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy10: I don't like where this is going.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy12: Feeling a bit under the weather.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy14: I wouldn't mind something fun right now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy15: I need something to keep me distracted.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy25: Uugh... I could really use... Anyone, right now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy30: Get your head in the game, Milky...
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy31: I need to focus... This is... This is all a lot.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy33: I miss... My friends... The lab... F-fuck, focus.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy34: Milky... Stop being so gloomy... I need to keep moving.
Locale.dialogue_milky_gloomy35: One foot in front of another. One foot in front of another.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed2: Who am I trying to impress..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed4: There's has to be a point to all this...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed5: Please... Anything to make me feel better.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed6: Can something ease my suffering? Anything?
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed7: I just want this to stop.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed8: This is my life now. Great.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed10: This place is going to tear me apart.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed11: I'm not going to make it through this... N-no! I will! I need to keep going!
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed12: What am I going to do...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed14: I can do this... I can...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed15: I need something to help me forget this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed17: Why did they do this to me?
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed18: Who dumped me here, just for me to suffer?..
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed19: I wish I could just... Understand this more.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed26: I won't hurt myself... I won't... I need to keep going...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed28: When my death comes, will it be swift..? I... *Sigh*...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed29: I don't want to die here...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed31: There's a point to this... There has to be... There... Has to be..."
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed32: All of this is fucking revolting.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed34: F-fuck. Fuck this! Fuck you! I-... No, keep going...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed36: Push through it Milky. Keep going. T-this happens... We all feel this way sometimes..."
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed37: We all feel like this from time to time... Things... Things will get better...
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed38: Come on... Come the fuck on! I can do this!
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressed39: Mmmmh... I miss... I miss my family...
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable2: I can't do this. I just can't.
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable3: Was I born, to only feel pain?
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable4: Make it stop... Make it stop...
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable5: I need to be high. I need it.
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable6: I'm getting this god damn battery. Fuck.
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable8: I am so fucking done with all of this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable20: Fuck this! I can't! I... I can't...
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable21: Keep going! Keep going! AGHHH!!! I'm so fucking done!
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable22: I can't keep putting on this act anymore.
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable23: This is too much. This... It's sickening.
Locale.dialogue_milky_miserable24: I can't keep pushing myself forward like this...
Locale.dialogue_milky_selfharm2: This... These feelings... They make me sick.
Locale.dialogue_milky_suicide3: Ooouughhhh... Ughhh... Shit!.. What was that!?
Locale.dialogue_milky_suicide4: Ooughh... This... This is too much... This is too fucking much..!
Locale.dialogue_milky_suicide5: Ughhhh... I gotta pull through... I can pull through this...
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleeding15: Need some dressing. Plants will do.
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleeding16: Should check my person for some dressing or a bandage.
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy4: Fuck, fuck, fuck... This is bad...
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy5: I don't want it to end like this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy8: This is bad. This is bad...
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy10: Fuck. Fuck, okay! Bandage! Dressing! Anything!
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy12: I can fix this... Come on... Fuck...
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy13: F-fuck... Focus... I can s-salvage this...
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy15: My vision is all blurry... I need to stay focused...
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy19: Concentrate on the wound... You can salvage this!
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingheavy20: Fucking FOCUS! You can do this Milky! You can fix this!
Locale.dialogue_milky_steponglass1: That was horribly careless of me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_steponglass2: I need to clean up any broken glass I procure.
Locale.dialogue_milky_steponglass3: I'd prefer to avoid inserting glass into my feet.
Locale.dialogue_milky_steponglass8: Really? Why the fuck did I do that..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse4: I hope I won't end up like this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse10: I knew there were more of us here...
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse11: It's gonna be okay... It's gonna be okay.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse12: Someone should give them a proper burial.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse14: How many of us have died here...?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse17: I wish I could've given this guy a hug before they passed away.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse18: I hope it wasn't painful, at least...
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse20: I'm sorry. You must have suffered a terrible fate.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse21: ...I wish I was there for you. I'm sorry.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpse23: I... I'm sorry. I wish it didn't have to end this way for you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsedesensitized5: I'm scared I might end up recognising one of you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsedesensitized6: I think the fact I haven't recognised any of these bodies... How many of us were sent here to die..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsedesensitized9: Add that to the tally... I guess.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsedesensitized15: I'm sorry you had to go through that. It must have been tough.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsedesensitized16: Your pain is over now, at least.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsesuicidal1: N-not like this. I don't want to join them.
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsesuicidal2: I... Am I gonna be like that..? Soon..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsesuicidal3: This... This could be me... Fuck, I need to focus...
Locale.dialogue_milky_seecorpsesuicidal4: I'm going to be sick... I can't handle this... I..."
Locale.dialogue_milky_cold1: My fur isn't thick enough for this weather.
Locale.dialogue_milky_cold3: I should find some place to warm up a little.
Locale.dialogue_milky_cold7: Do I have anything that may warm me up?
Locale.dialogue_milky_cold8: I may want to do some exercise to warm up.
Locale.dialogue_milky_cold9: I could do with some extra layers. It's cold here.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm1: It's a little hot in here.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm5: Something to cool me off would be nice.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm7: I should drink something cool and refreshing.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm8: I might want to find some place where the temperature is more reasonable.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm9: This temperature is a little unreasonable right now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm10: My fur is too think for this weather.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm11: I'd like to find some place to cool off.
Locale.dialogue_milky_warm12: Any warmer and it'll get uncomfortable.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot5: I'm gonna pass out from this heat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot7: I can't think straight with this heat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot8: I feel sick from this heat...
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot9: Something to cool me off would be great.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot14: I could really use a cold drink right now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot16: I'm finding it difficult to tolerate this heat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot18: The heat is a little too much to handle now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hot20: Hyperthermia is kicking in. I need some place cool to stay for a moment.
Locale.dialogue_milky_exerted2: I'd like to stop for a moment.
Locale.dialogue_milky_exerted6: I need to take a moment...
Locale.dialogue_milky_exerted7: I need a moment to sit.
Locale.dialogue_milky_exerted11: Who knew these little limbs could exhaust me this much?
Locale.dialogue_milky_exerted14: That's enough work for a moment.
Locale.dialogue_milky_exerted16: One moment. I'm a little tuckered out.
Locale.dialogue_milky_freezing10: I'm going to freeze to death...
Locale.dialogue_milky_freezing12: I need to get warm. Now...
Locale.dialogue_milky_freezing13: I need to get to somewhere warm.
Locale.dialogue_milky_emaciated1: I am so thin... I feel weaker.
Locale.dialogue_milky_emaciated3: This kind of weight loss might end very badly for me at this point.
Locale.dialogue_milky_emaciated4: I really need to eat more...
Locale.dialogue_milky_emaciated5: I'm way too skinny... This can't be good for me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_obese1: I feel so heavy and sluggish.
Locale.dialogue_milky_obese3: I need to drop a few kilos.
Locale.dialogue_milky_obese4: I can see the fat building up on me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_obese5: I can't continue eating this much.
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiated3: This feels gggreeatttt... Haha... I love it...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiated7: I feel like I'm gonna pass out... And I love it...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiated11: I want more of this... Hahahah...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiated12: I want more of whatever this is... Haha... This feeling...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiatedsad4: I feel so much... Funnier... Haha...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiatedsad6: I could... do this more!... Yes. Hahaha...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiatewithdrawal2: I want more drugs. Fuck, I actually want more drugs.
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiatewithdrawal3: I'm addicted. I really need to lay off on the drugs. Ugh, but-.
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiatewithdrawal4: I want to laugh again... I want more drugs...
Locale.dialogue_milky_opiatewithdrawal5: I miss those opiates... I miss that feeling...
Locale.dialogue_milky_pain17: My <limb>'s in a lot of pain.
Locale.dialogue_milky_pain21: There's something really wrong with my <limb>.
Locale.dialogue_milky_pain22: I need something to ease the pain...
Locale.dialogue_milky_pain23: Let's take it easy for a while... My <limb> hurts real bad.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hitbycreature3: GET IT OFF OF ME! AAHHHH!
Locale.dialogue_milky_hitbycreature8: AAHHHH FUCK! FUCK! GET AWAY FROM ME!
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty6: Eugh... My fur is all dirty.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty7: I think I need a shower.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty8: All this dirt on me... I feel like an animal.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty10: I need to clean off all this dirt.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty12: Really should wash all the dirt off...
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty14: I'm pretty sure those lifepods have showers in them... I really could use one.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty16: Gosh, I am COVERED in gunk!
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty18: Ugh! I'm completely covered in filth.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirty20: I feel filthy. I really need a bath, or something...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered6: As much as I feel like all of these things will be useful, I'm really weighed down...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered7: The load is a little much...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered8: I feel weighed down by all I am carrying.
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered9: I feel safer with all this gear... But it's really heavy.
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered10: Okay, this weight is getting a bit too much to handle...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered11: Wish I was stronger, so I could carry more of this stuff...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered12: Wish there was like... A Dune... That could carry all this stuff for me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered13: Wish a buddy could hold onto my gear for me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumbered14: Milky bodies were not made to carry this much... Frankly, they weren't made for much at all.
Locale.dialogue_milky_drillend2: I swear that thing had no soundproofing.
Locale.dialogue_milky_loud2: ...Fuck, loud ass noises in caves aren't nice.
Locale.dialogue_milky_loud3: ...Fuck, these caves are making noises way too loud.
Locale.dialogue_milky_loud4: ...Shit, that was louder than I thought.
Locale.dialogue_milky_murderregret1: H-holy shit... Holy shit!.. Why did I do that!?
Locale.dialogue_milky_murderregret2: Oh my fucking... Oh... They- I..
Locale.dialogue_milky_murderregret3: It was self defense!!! IT WAS SELF DEFENSE!!!
Locale.dialogue_milky_murderregret4: Oh... Fuck, Fuck what did I DO!?
Locale.dialogue_milky_murderregret5: It... It had to be done, I-... There was no other way.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradeemeet5: Greetings. Might I inquire on your wares?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradeemeet6: It's nice to see another face. I hope you are well!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradeemeet8: It's so good to see someone else. How are you?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradeemeet9: Hello, I hope you don't mind me being here.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradeemeet10: A friend! How are you doing?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradeemeet11: Hello, dear. I hope you are well.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetnormal2: Greetings, you are a welcome sight.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetnormal3: Welcome, Milky. Please make yourself comfortable.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetnormal5: A Milky is making the descent?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetnormal6: A Milky descending the planet? How courageous.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetgood3: Hey! Hello! Make yourself at home!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetgood4: Haha, hi Milky! Pleasure seeing you!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetgood5: You aren't my kind, but that's no problem! Welcome!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetgood6: Welcome, welcome! How has your descent been, Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetbad2: I... Hello, Milky... Are you okay..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetbad3: Hi... Are you alright..? You seem... Concerning?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetbad5: Not the most pleasant site, sorry.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhugsuccess1: Mmmmff... Your fur is so fluffy...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhugsuccess4: Mmm!.. You're a brave Milky. You've got this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhugfail2: N-not cool! I don't want you to touch me, sorry!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhugfail3: Paws off, please! Sorry, but I don't want to hug you!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhugfail4: Sorry Milky, but no. Please don't do that again.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhugfail5: I... I don't really trust you, Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhagglesuccess2: Good point, Milky. Here, I'll give a discount.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhagglesuccess3: I see, I see! Great points!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhagglesuccess4: You know what, fair! I'll see what I can do.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhagglesuccess5: You know what you're doing, Milky. I'll give you that.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhagglesuccess6: I suppose I could do something for a friend.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderhagglefail5: I don't see your point, Milky. Sorry.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderdepressed1: A Milky? Hello..? Are you okay..? Do you need something..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderdepressed2: Milkies?.. Didn't think I'd see one. Uhm. Hi..? Hello..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderdepressed3: You look petrified! Are you okay..? Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradergiveitem6: Thanks friend! Please, peruse my wares.
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradergiveitemrefuse1: You've given plenty gifts, Milky! Why don't you see what you can buy?
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradergiveitemrefuse2: That's enough for now, friend! I don't need anything else.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderbuy2: I know this will find good use with you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderbuy3: You've given me enough, you can have it friend.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderbuyfail2: Thought you knew how this worked, Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderbuyfail3: Ah, haha. No? Pay up first!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderbuyfailmaxvalue1: Sorry, friend! I'm not looking to trade everything I own.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderwarning1: Get out of my fucking pod, Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderwarning7: Fuck off, out of my life pod!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderwarning8: I'm sick of your shit, Milky!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradercombat3: I'M GOING TO FUCKING KILL YOU!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradercombat5: I'M SICK OF YOU! FUCK OFF!
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradercombat7: I'M GOING TO TEAR YOU TO SHREDS, MILKY!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderthreatensuccess1: Fuck, okay! Please, just take something and leave me alone!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderthreatensuccess2: Milky!? Seriously! I-... Fuck, whatever... Just, just leave me alone...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderthreatensuccess3: I... Uhm... Okay, Milky... Take whatever...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderthreatensuccess4: I thought you were my friend!.. I... I won't do anything, take something and leave...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderthreatensuccess5: O-oh... I don't want you to hurt me Milky... Please, g-go right ahead...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderlightbreak2: Fucking, okay then. Wow. Leave please.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderlightbreak3: Not cool. I want you out, please.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderwakegreet2: Oh! Wasn't sure if the little ball of fluff in the corner of my life pod was still you. Morning!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderwakegreet4: Rise and shine, Milky! I hope you slept well!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderwakegreet5: Enjoy your rest, Milky? I hope you did!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseegun1: WOAH! Put the gun away! Please! I don't want any trouble!
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseegun2: What did I do!? Please don't shoot me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseegun3: Milky? Woah- no-no-no... Please don't shoot...
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseegun4: P-Please don't shoot me... Please don't... Please...
Locale.dialogue_milky_tradermeetimpairedspeech2: Pardon? I mean- Hey Milky. You got something in your mouth?
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseehurt1: You're hurt. I might have a bandage on me, please check.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseehurt2: Are you okay?.. I might have something that can help.
Locale.dialogue_milky_traderseehurt3: That looks like it hurts.. Uhm, maybe I could help? Check my wares at least.
Locale.dialogue_milky_swingresponse7: LET ME-! LET ME MAKE IT UP TO YOU!
Locale.dialogue_milky_braindamaged14: Copper..? My brain, I... I think...
Locale.dialogue_milky_braindamaged15: What's that taste..? Is my brain-...
Locale.dialogue_milky_braindamaged17: Fuck... Uhhghhh... Ughhhh what the fuckk.... My... Wow...
Locale.dialogue_milky_braindamaged18: Brain... It's in my brain... My brain...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments1: I don't... want to die... I don't want to die...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments2: Please... Please... Someone save... Save me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments3: I don't want to die... Please... Please...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments4: Not... Not like this... Please... Help me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments5: H-help... Someone... I don't w-want to die...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments6: I don't... I don't want to leave this world...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments7: Save me... Save me... S-save me... Please...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments8: This.. Is... H-h... Is this how... How it ends...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments9: All... Everything I've done... To... To lead up to t-this... Save m-me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments10: No.. No.... N-no... Please... Please... I don't... I-I don't want to d-die... Help me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments11: Ffhh... Gh.... Help me... Please... Anyone...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments12: Nhh... Not like t-this... Please... P-please... Save me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments13: Please... I don't... I don't want to die... Save me... Anyone... Anything... I-I'm not r-ready...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments15: Stop... Stop... Stop... Please... S-stop... Not l-like this... Save me...
Locale.dialogue_milky_lastmoments16: Fuck... Fuck... Help me... I don't... Want to d-die... H-h..
Locale.dialogue_milky_magicheal2: Ahh..! ...Huh. That feels... That feels better. I liked that.
Locale.dialogue_milky_selfdestruct1: My ears..? Wait- Wait no. You can't be fucking serious! FUCK FUCK! FUCKKKKKKKKK! GET IT OUT! GET IT OUT!-
Locale.dialogue_milky_selfdestruct2: ... ... ...Wait... ...I... What did I do wrong..? I... I was just trying to prove myself... F-fuck, Wait!-
Locale.dialogue_milky_selfdestruct3: Self des-... Wait, Wait no! Please make it stop! I'll prove myself, I swear! I'll make it right! FUCK! PLEASE MAKE IT STOP! I'LL SHOW YOU I'M STRONGER-!
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitresponse1: Oohhh... What did you eat, Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitresponse3: That was a lot... Uhm, you okay?
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitresponse4: My floor... Whatever, are you okay, Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitbloodresponse1: Vomit..? O-oh... That's blood.. You threw up blood... I... Uhm.
Locale.dialogue_milky_vomitbloodresponse3: Oh... Oohh... You aren't doing well, are you...
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungryresponse1: I might have food on me Milky, if you're looking to trade.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hungryresponse2: Check outside, Milky. If you can't find anything, maybe I've got something?
Locale.dialogue_milky_thirstyresponse1: Forgot what's on me, but you might find something to drink!
Locale.dialogue_milky_thirstyresponse2: I'll see what I have that might be able to sate your thirst.
Locale.dialogue_milky_sadresponse1: ...Milky..? You've got this, friend... Chin up, for me!
Locale.dialogue_milky_sadresponse2: Things will get better, friend. You're welcome to spend some time with me if it makes you feel better...
Locale.dialogue_milky_sadresponse3: ...I hope you're okay, Milky. If you need someone to talk to, I'm right here.
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressedresponse1: ...Milky... I don't know if it.. Means much to you, but... I believe in you! You can pull through! Stay strong, please!
Locale.dialogue_milky_depressedresponse2: ...You're strong, Milky... I don't know what I'd do if I'd been through everything you have... Stay strong.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hotresponse1: Feel free to adjust the heat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hotresponse2: You could adjust the pod's temperature.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hotresponse3: Adjust the temperature, I'm not fussed.
Locale.dialogue_milky_hotresponse4: Your coat not appreciating the weather, friend?
Locale.dialogue_milky_coldresponse1: Isn't your coat thicker than mine, Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_coldresponse3: It is a little cold... You can switch the temperature if you'd like.
Locale.dialogue_milky_coldresponse4: I wouldn't mind being warmed up too, friend. Feel free to adjust the heat.
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingresponse1: You'll be okay, friend. Pull through this. I believe in you!
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingresponse2: F-fuck, uhm okay. Bandages, bandages... Do I have any bandages..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_bleedingresponse3: You can fix the bleeding though... Right?
Locale.dialogue_milky_painresponse1: Ooo, that looks like it hurts... Sorry, friend.
Locale.dialogue_milky_painresponse2: Ow. Uhm. I might have something to help... In exchange for something of yours.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirtyresponse1: You can always use my life pod's shower.
Locale.dialogue_milky_dirtyresponse2: Yeah, it's kinda obvious, haha... White fur, n' all...
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumberedresponse1: Milkies often carry lots. I spose you might need it. Maybe I can lighten the load..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_encumberedresponse2: Let's trade then, Milky. I might be able to offer a lighter alternative?
Locale.dialogue_milky_dyingresponse1: Fuck... Milky!? Stay with me Milky! U-uh shit... What do I do..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_dyingresponse2: Milky? Milky!? Keep breathing Milky, I uh... Fuck... Fuck- what do I do?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetnormal1: Good day- oh, a fellow Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetnormal2: What a pleasant sight. I hope the descent has been treating you well.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetnormal3: Welcome. Would you like to take a look at some of my wares?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetnormal5: Another Milky... It's been a long time.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetgood2: Welcome, dear! Please make yourself comfortable.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetgood3: Another Milky! It's so nice to see another of my kind.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetgood4: You're the most welcome sight I've seen in a while.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetgood5: Salutations, fellow Milky. Please, treat this as your home for the time being.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetbad2: ...It's... Nice seeing one of my own...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetbad3: Welcome... Please do not trash the place.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetbad4: The descent looks like it hasn't been treating you well, Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwakegreet1: Is that what I look like when I sleep?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwakegreet2: Morning, Milky. Ready to continue the descent?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwakegreet3: You slept rather comfortably. Good morning.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwakegreet4: Morning, sleepyhead. How was the rest?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwakegreet5: Most of the Milkies in my containment facility were restless. You seemed... Comfortable.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradergiveitem2: I'll find a use for this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradergiveitem3: I can make this work, thank you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradergiveitem5: I see... I can make use of this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradergiveitemrefuse: Enough gifts, Milky. Let's trade now.
That's enough gifts. I'd rather we traded.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglesuccess1: You think that'll work on me?.. It will, here.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglesuccess4: I'll give you a discount, but only because you're a brave Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglesuccess5: Very brave of you to try to rip me off... I like that, here.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglefail1: Really? A Milky making desperate pleas? Pathetic.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglefail2: You're kind of pathetic, you know that?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglefail4: For a Milky, you're kind of awful at the whole "ripping people off" thing.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhagglefail5: New to trading, I see. That's not going to work, Milky.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderbuyfail5: This is a trade, not a charity.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderbuyfailmaxvalu: Enough trading for today. You've bought out a lot already.
I don't wish to thoroughly swap our possessions. Let's call it a day.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderthreatensucces: I think I know better than most what a well equipped Milky can do. Take something and leave.
Fine. Take something and go. I hope nothing but torment awaits you in those caves.
I see, why of course. Please, help yourself... Then go kindly fuck off.
I shouldn't have trusted my own kind.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwarning1: Sorry Milky, but you need to leave.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwarning2: I want you out of my pod. Immediately.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwarning5: Do you want me to tear you to shreds?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwarning6: I can't wait to slit your throat. Do you want that?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderwarning7: Leave, Milky. Leave right fucking now.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradercombat3: It pains me to kill one of my own.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradercombat5: I'M GOING TO GOUGE YOUR EYES OUT!
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradercombat6: SO IT WOULD COME TO THIS!
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhugsuccess1: Mmh... I love hugging my own kind...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhugsuccess2: I needed this... Please, take care of yourself...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhugsuccess4: You're a fluffy Milky... Keep yourself safe...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhugsuccess5: Affection from my own kind... I forgot how much I missed this...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderhugfail3: I-if it's from... Actually, nevermind. Please don't touch me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderseegun2: You'd really shoot one of your own?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermeetimpairedsp: I can't understand anything from you.
Your speech is muffled. Please speak clearly.
You got something in your mouth, Milky?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderseehurt1: You appear to be injured and bleeding... You can take a bandage if you wish.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderseehurt2: Please don't bleed all over my floor. Grab a bandage and treat yourself if you see one, mine are free.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderseehurt3: That doesn't look good... You may take a bandage for free if you can find one on me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderlightbreak1: Fucking Milkies, what was I expecting.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderlightbreak3: I needed that light, Milky. Planning on reinstalling it, huh? Replacing the batteries? Of course you aren't, fuck you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_traderlightbreak4: *Sigh*... what was I expecting. Get out.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_tradermovefail1: I'm content with being here, thank you very much.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_vomitresponse1: You appear to have returned your stomach contents.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_vomitresponse5: You're sick. A lot of things make us Milkies sick. I hope you can treat it.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_vomitbloodresponse1: ...Internal bleeding. Check me, I might have a chest drain or some coagulant that could help slow the process.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_hungryresponse1: If you imagine me to satiate your hunger without payment, you would be sorely mistaken.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_hungryresponse2: I'm not a charity. Find some food, or exhange something with me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_thirstyresponse1: You're an explorer, aren't you? Go drink from a puddle outside.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_thirstyresponse2: I might have something drinkable I can trade. If I don't, you're on your own.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_sadresponse3: Focus on the journey at hand. Spiraling will not save you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_depressedresponse1: ...Spiraling into desparity will not solve any of your problems.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_depressedresponse2: ...You've come far enough. Get your head in the game.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_depressedresponse3: ...It pains me to see another Milky like this.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_braindamagedresponse: I'd wager you have a concussion.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_hotresponse1: I may let you use this lifepod's cooler if you behave.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_hotresponse2: Tweak the temperature to your liking.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_coldresponse1: It's rather cold. Turn up the heating, please.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_coldresponse3: This life pod has a heater. Turn it on, please.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_bleedingresponse1: Please don't bleed all over me.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_bleedingresponse2: I implore you to take care of your wounds.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_painresponse1: Pain is a guarantee down here. Toughen up.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_painresponse2: Take a painkiller. Surely, you must have some...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_dirtyresponse1: Your white fur does not blend well with all that soot. Clean yourself at once.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_encumberedresponse1: Such a tease you are... Trade what you want, I know a lot of your gear is important to you.
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr1_encumberedresponse2: Your possessions are valuable. Perhaps you may find lighter equipment on me that still suits your needs?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_tradermeetgood4: Dune find... Go-od fri-end!... Tas-ty... Fri-end..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbite1: Che-wy... Enjoy tast-e. Like fri-end more!
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbite4: Eat good... Fri-end good... Fr-iend che-wy...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbite5: Dune lo-ves fri-end taste... Fri-end tex-ture...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbuy3: Dune gi-ve back gif-t! Fri-end have...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbuy6: Fri-end give... Once... Dune give too...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbuyfail5: Du-ne not gif-t... Giv-e now!... Grrrr...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderbuyfailmaxvalu: Dune give so mu-ch... Too much... Fri-end stop...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderthreatensucces: Not need eff-ort... Take thing... Me-an...
Dune not take up com-bat... Take thi-ng and leave... Ggrhhr...
Fri-end gr-eat.. Hunter! Dune... Fear... Y-ou take...
Dune weak-er... Dune give... Up... Ta-ke and lea-ve...
Don't hu-rt Dune... Ta-ke thi-ng... Lea-ve...
Dune all-ow evil fri-end take thi-ng... But Dune ha-te fri-end...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderwarning2: Mnnnhh... Che-wy is ask for it...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderwarning6: Dune not let fri-end in!... Out!...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderhugsuccess5: Uhh... Grr... Du-ne not get... Dune allow...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderhugsuccess7: Dune not know... Why fri-end... Fri-end can do...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderhugfail6: Fri-end do not app-ro-ach! Grrr... Dune dis-like...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseegun4: Fri-end... Dune f-ear you... Lo-ud sti-ck...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseegun5: Why fri-end ho-ld... thing of pain?...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseegun7: Why fri-end ho-ld... Click-boom... Dune... Dislike...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseegun8: Dune fear... Fee-mee-jee?... Pain... Not get...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_tradermeetimpairedsp: Dune not under-stand... Word bet-ter! Fri-end word bad...
What is fri-end say..? Voice is muf-fle...
Dune word ba-d... Fri-end word bad... Bad bad!...
Du-ne hard talk... Fri-end talk... ba-d...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseehurt1: Fri-end hurt... Ngghhgrr... Take fix thin-g... Free...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseehurt2: Why hurt?.. Dune can... gi-ve li-fe thing... Free...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseehurt3: Fri-end i-nj-ure... Dune give thing-help... Free...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseehurt4: Th-is fri-end bo-dy bad... Dune ca-n gift fix...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderseehurt5: Fri-end feel pain... Dune gift help...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderlightbreak1: NNGGHHRR! Why fri-end steal! Go away! GGrrhhhhhh... BAD..!
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderlightbreak3: BAD! Grrrr... Fri-end bad... Bad! Lea-ve!
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_traderlightbreak4: Dune NOT SEE! BAD FRI-END! GO AWAY... AW-AY!
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_vomitresponse4: Che-wy fri-end... No thr-ow up... Che-wy bit-s... Sta-y insi-de...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_vomitbloodresponse1: Du-ne... Smell blo-od... From... Fri-end... Tas-ty..?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_vomitbloodresponse2: Ch-... Che-wy... Blo-od... Sme-ll blo-od..? Tast-e...
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_thirstyresponse1: Du-ne drink puddle... Feel bet-ter... Friend try?
Locale.dialogue_milky_chr2_depressedresponse1: Fri-end look very bad... Co-me sit with Du-ne!

Locale.note_gunsaw_albino1:
Heart gave out again. Third time. Maybe fourth. Hard to keep count when the floor keeps moving.

Had to use the pump. Held the paddles myself. Hands weren't steady. Took two tries. Could feel it the whole time. Not pain, I turned that off, but the absence. The nothing where the beating should be. Like holding your breath except it isn't your lungs.<>
Epi brought me back enough to stand. Stim kept me standing. Oxy kept the blood worth pumping. I burned through everything I had just to walk another hundred meters.

It's getting worse. Used to be I could push twice before the crash. Now it comes faster. Harder. The pressure builds in my skull before my chest even starts. I can feel the vessels straining. Something behind my eyes. Something wrong.<>
I need to go deeper.<>
I know what happens at this point. I've felt it. The moment where everything just... stops. Not slows. Stops. And the only thing still moving is whatever part of me is still thinking, still counting the seconds, still waiting to find out if this is the time it doesn't come back.

It came back. It always comes back.

It has to come back.<>
I have the supplies. Stim. Epi. Oxy. Pump. Paddles. Laid them out in order. Taped the pump to my chest so it's already there when I go down. I won't have time to look for it. I know that now.

Next time I'll go further. Next time I'll make it count.<>
Again. It has to be again. There is nothing else.
Locale.note_gunsaw_albino2:
Quite the perplexing encounter today.
<>

It has become increasingly apparent that the Company did not consign only Experiments, Milkies, and Dunes to this miserable planet. Every so often I cross paths with individuals belonging to species I had never so much as heard whispered about within the laboratories. Chompies. Rozas. Ickes. Curious creatures, all of them. The closest thing I had seen to kin was a Voyager. Detestable thing. That is, however, beside the point.
<>

Today's visitor was an Experiment. Or so I believed at first glance. They possessed all the expected characteristics: stature, ears, tail, facial structure. Yet their coat was almost entirely white, not unlike my own. Initially I suspected hybridisation with another species, though prolonged observation disproved the notion. Their unusual coloration appeared entirely natural. Patches of faint pigmentation interrupted the white fur in irregular patterns, but these bore none of the characteristics of scarring, burns, or disease.
<>

I have heard mention of such an individual before. Back within the facility, Socks once spoke of an Experiment housed at another containment complex. She claimed they would occasionally be transported together for various procedures, and described one with an unnaturally pale coat. At the time I dismissed the account as embellishment. Perhaps I should have listened?
<>

The poor soul was in dreadful condition. Numerous lacerations, active bleeding, and the complete absence of one eye suggested a life far harsher than my own. More peculiar still was their conduct. They offered an astonishing quantity of supplies in exchange for a single dose of Epinephrine. Such a proposal would be irrational unless they possessed remarkably poor medical knowledge... or were simply desperate.
<>

They repeatedly clutched at their chest between sentences. Despite that, I cannot say whether they understood what the medication actually does, only that they seemed convinced they required it. Regardless, I accepted the trade.
<>

I do hope they are still alive.
<>

(Attached to the note is a sketch of the Experiment. It is in rough shape.)
